# XD MEDIA

> Full-stack marketing, branding & technology agency based in Mohali/Chandigarh, India, serving clients across tier-1 markets (US, UK, Canada, Australia) and India. We deliver measurable growth through SEO, performance marketing, web development, and AI/GEO search readiness — directly and white-label for agencies.

XD MEDIA is backed by established ventures with a track record spanning entertainment, technology, and digital marketing (₹35+ crore annual revenue, 112.5+ billion YouTube views delivered, 1M+ combined subscribers). We combine data-driven SEO, high-performance web development, and creative performance marketing to help brands rank, convert, and scale — and help agencies white-label our execution under their own brand. Trusted by 200+ companies worldwide.

## Services

- [SEO Services](https://www.xdmedia.in/seo-service): Full-funnel organic growth — keyword strategy, technical SEO, content, and link building for global clients.
- [Affordable SEO Services in India](https://www.xdmedia.in/affordable-seo-services-in-india): India-focused SEO packages and pricing for local and national businesses.
- [Website Design & Development](https://www.xdmedia.in/website-design): Custom, conversion-focused websites built on React.js, Next.js, WordPress, and Shopify/WooCommerce.
- [Web Development Services](https://www.xdmedia.in/web-development-services): Custom web apps, eCommerce platforms, and scalable software engineering.
- [Web Development Company India](https://www.xdmedia.in/web-development-company-india): India-based web development team serving global and domestic clients.
- [Performance Marketing & Brand Growth](https://www.xdmedia.in/performance-marketing): Paid media across Search, Display, Shopping, YouTube, Facebook, and Instagram.
- [GMB / Google Business Profile Optimization](https://www.xdmedia.in/gmb-optimization): Local SEO and Google Maps 3-Pack ranking for location-based businesses.
- [List Your Business on ChatGPT](https://www.xdmedia.in/list-your-business-on-chatgpt): AI search readiness — getting brands discovered by ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other AI assistants.
- [AI Automation Tools](https://www.xdmedia.in/ai-automation-tools): Custom chatbots, lead routing, and CRM/ERP automation (HubSpot, Salesforce).

## White Label

- [White Label SEO Services](https://www.xdmedia.in/white-label-seo): SEO execution for agencies to resell under their own brand.
- [White Label Digital Marketing Partner Plan](https://www.xdmedia.in/white-label-digital-marketing): Full-service SEO, PPC, and funnel creation delivered under partner agencies' branding.
